name: hud_ui_confirm_quit_ok_button_on_activate
description: HudUiConfirmQuitOkButton::OnActivate confirms quitting by skipping the main-menu exit delay, queuing the current-state exits, selecting leave-network, and running the shared ZRD widget activation.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_state_confirm_quit_destructors VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x415740 validates g_RecoilState_MainMenuSkipExitDelay = 1, QueueExitCurrentState(1), QueueExitCurrentState(0), g_RecoilApp.m_missionShutdownMode = 1, QueueSwitchCurrentState(&g_RecoilApp.m_leaveNetworkState, 0), and HudUiZrdWidget::OnActivate.
The native smoke verifies the skip-delay and mission-shutdown writes, three queued items in order with params 1/0/0, leave-network switch target, three exits, and one enter.
